title: DetailGraphRelation
description: Defines a resolution path from project condition through manufacturer system and assembly constraint set to a construction detail. Prepares the relation model for the future Detail Graph.

relation_id.description: Unique identifier for this detail graph relation.

project_condition.description: Reference to the condition node_id representing the project condition.

manufacturer_system.description: Reference to the manufacturer system node_id that addresses this condition.

assembly_constraint_set.description: Reference to the assembly constraint set constraint_id.

output_detail.description: Reference to the detail node_id produced by this resolution path.

resolution_status.description: Honesty status of this resolution path.

resolution_notes.description: Notes on what is needed to ground this resolution path.
